title: Generated Adapter Drift And Conformance Closeout
summary: #360 added ordinary contract-tooling drift checks for generated command adapter output and black-box conformance coverage assertions for generated adapters. #361 remains open for no-direct-edit guardrails, and #356 remains open as the parent lane.
